headline: Why F5 (FFIV) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of application security provider F5 (NASDAQ:FFIV) jumped 2.8% in the afternoon session after the company announced two significant collaborations aimed at strengthening its position in the artificial intelligence (AI) market.
